constraints.def: CHECK (age IS NULL OR age >= 13 AND age <= 100)
FOREIGN KEY (approved_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
CHECK (fuel_gel_carbs_g IS NULL OR fuel_gel_carbs_g >= 10 AND fuel_gel_carbs_g <= 80)
CHECK (fuel_target_g_per_hr IS NULL OR fuel_target_g_per_hr >= 30 AND fuel_target_g_per_hr <= 120)
CHECK (max_hr IS NULL OR max_hr >= 100 AND max_hr <= 230)
CHECK (max_hr_override IS NULL OR max_hr_override >= 100 AND max_hr_override <= 230)
CHECK (resting_hr IS NULL OR resting_hr >= 30 AND resting_hr <= 100)
CHECK (resting_hr_override IS NULL OR resting_hr_override >= 30 AND resting_hr_override <= 100)
CHECK (vdot_manual_override IS NULL OR vdot_manual_override >= 20::numeric AND vdot_manual_override <= 90::numeric)
